title: Komal Nahta - Aur Ek Kahani
subTitle: Komal Nahta, the host and a renowned film critic, invites the famous personalities of Indian cinema and discusses issues regarding their personal lives and their journey in the industry.

title: Kuldip Patwal: I Didn't Do It!
subTitle: Kuldip Patwal, a common man, finds himself embroiled in the murder of a politician. While he tries to prove his innocence, the state government sets out to make sure that he gets punished.
